description_long: This is a wide-brimmed, dark brown hat with a slightly textured surface, reminiscent of a classic Western or gaucho style. The brim is broad and flat, providing ample shade, and the crown is rounded with a subtle dome shape. A dark band encircles the base of the crown, adding a touch of contrast and structure to the design. The front features a pair of gold-tinted, angular glasses or goggles integrated into the hat, giving it a distinctive and somewhat mysterious appearance. Some dark strands, possibly representing hair or decorative tassels, hang from beneath the brim at the back. The overall look is both functional and stylish, suitable for urban environments where sun protection and fashion are desired.
description: A wide-brimmed, dark brown hat with a rounded crown, dark band, and integrated gold-tinted glasses at the front, exuding a Western or gaucho-inspired style.
description_view_0: Front view shows the wide, flat brim, rounded crown, and prominent gold-tinted glasses integrated at the front.
description_view_1: Rear view highlights the continuous dark band around the crown and dark strands hanging from beneath the brim.
description_view_2: Direct back view emphasizes the symmetrical, wide brim and the dome-shaped crown, with minimal visible detail.
description_view_3: Three-quarter rear view displays the band, brim, and the hanging strands, with a partial side profile of the crown.
